title: CPMU
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1cof8","text":"Mineralising solution for the oral biofilm. From Sissons et al. 1991.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"dpj9r","text":"This solution MUST be prepared in a sterile and starch-free environment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 300 mL distilled (or deionized) dH 2 O to a 1000 mL beaker, with stirring and heat 60 °C

Add: - 1.55 g Calcium Chloride Contributed by users - 1.44 g Sodium Phosphate monobasic Contributed by users - 0.72 g Sodium Fluorophosphate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #344443 (CAS: 10163-15-2) - 0.08 g Magnesium Chloride Fisher Scientific Catalog #AC223210010 - 30 g Urea P212121
Add the remaining 700 mL and keep stirring until precipitate has completely dissolved Store in fridge at 4 °C The solution should be filter-sterilised before storing!
creator: Bjørn Peare Bartholdy
